caption: A man sits in a podcast studio, wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a red bow tie, glasses, and a tall, pointed grey wig. He wears black headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs. To his left, a logo for "PISTOLIO PODCAST" is visible, and to his right, the text "GOSS TALK JOY" appears. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his facial expressions and mouth movements as he speaks. The background and equipment remain static, while the subtle movements of his head and lips indicate he is in the middle of a conversation.
